summary: Completed testing of Profile Picture Selection, Medal Showcase, and Medal Celebration features. All 22 backend API tests pass. Frontend UI components verified working correctly - Settings page camera button opens profile picture modal with empty state, Profile page shows Medal Showcase component with empty state.
seed_data_creation: No new seed data created. Test user has no minted photos or medals, so empty states were verified.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Profile Picture Selection, Medal Showcase, and Medal Celebration features are fully implemented and working. Test user (test2@blendlink.com) has no minted photos, so empty states are displayed. To test with actual photos, need a user with minted photos. Medal celebration triggers when record-round-result API returns medal_earned: true (requires 10 consecutive wins).

backend_apis: PUT /api/users/me/profile-picture - Updates user profile picture (200 OK)
GET /api/users/:user_id/medal-showcase - Returns showcase data with correct structure
PUT /api/users/me/medal-showcase - Updates showcase photo IDs (max 5 enforced)
POST /api/photo-game/record-round-result - Returns medal_earned and bonus_coins fields
frontend_components: Settings.jsx - ProfilePictureModal opens on camera button click
Settings.jsx - Empty state shown when no minted photos
Profile.jsx - Empty state 'No medals earned yet' displayed
BattleArena.jsx - MedalCelebration component integrated and ready to trigger
